user.title: Set up PhotopainterArt
user.description:
Enter the connection details for your PhotoPainter device.

💡 Tip: If the device appears offline and is battery-powered, press the BOOT button to wake it up.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your PhotoPainter device
data_description.ha_url: The URL where Home Assistant can be accessed, used by the PhotoFrame to fetch images

confirm.title: Confirm PhotoFrame Setup
confirm.description:
Device name: **{device_name}**

Click Submit to add this PhotoFrame to Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect:
Failed to connect to PhotoFrame. Please check the IP address/hostname and ensure the device is powered on.

💡 If battery-powered: Press the BOOT button to wake up the device.
error.duplicate_device_name: A PhotoFrame with this device name is already configured. Please change the device name on the PhotoFrame (via web interface or config) and try again.

abort.already_configured: This PhotoPainter device is already configured

rotate.name: Rotate Image
rotate.description: Manually trigger the device's own internal image rotation (same as pressing the KEY button).

display_image.name: Display Image
display_image.description: Display an image from a camera or image entity (legacy direct push).

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Camera or image entity to display.

generate_art.name: Generate & Display
generate_art.description: Produce the next image from a generator, camera, or URL and display it.

image_source.name: Image source
image_source.description: Where the image comes from: generative, camera, or url.

camera_entity_id.name: Camera/image entity
camera_entity_id.description: Camera or image entity to push.

image_url.name: Image URL
image_url.description: Direct image URL to fetch and push.

art_type.name: Art type
art_type.description: Which generator to use: dla, mandelbrot, or goban.

dla_frame.name: DLA – Frame number
dla_frame.description: Which frame in the DLA sequence to render (1–120).

mb_fg.name: Mandelbrot – Foreground colour
mb_fg.description: Colour used for the fractal detail.

mb_mode.name: Mandelbrot – Mode
mb_mode.description: Single frame or advancing zoom sequence.

goban_source.name: Goban – SGF source
goban_source.description: Where to get the SGF from: library, url, or inline text.

goban_library_id.name: Goban – Library game
goban_library_id.description: Id of a bundled public-domain SGF game.

goban_url.name: Goban – SGF download URL
goban_url.description: Direct URL to an .sgf file to download and render.

goban_sgf_text.name: Goban – SGF text
goban_sgf_text.description: Raw SGF game record to render directly.

goban_move.name: Goban – Move number
goban_move.description: Move number to display. 0 shows the final position.

goban_white_color.name: Goban – White stone colour
goban_white_color.description: Colour used to render White's stones.

goban_black_color.name: Goban – Black stone colour
goban_black_color.description: Colour used to render Black's stones.

goban_grid_thickness.name: Goban – Grid thickness
goban_grid_thickness.description: Line weight for the board grid (1 or 2).

goban_highlight.name: Goban – Last-move highlight
goban_highlight.description: Marker style for the most recent move.
